hero.headline: Orquestado
hero.subheadline: Orquestado connects channels, automates conversations, drives sales and operates 24/7. No code. No friction.

stages.body: The platform receives orders from WhatsApp, web and delivery. No calls. No paper.

stages.body: Responds instantly, qualifies leads and escalates to human only when needed.

stages.heading:

stages.body: Automated AI campaigns. Reminders, collections and follow-ups without operators.

stages.heading:
Never miss

stages.body: An AI receptionist that answers, classifies and routes incoming calls to the right area.

stages.label: Appointment management
stages.heading:

stages.body: Bookings by WhatsApp or voice. Automatic confirmation, reminders and cancellations.

stages.label: Digital presence
stages.heading:

stages.body: Landing pages, e-commerce and integrated automations. Your digital presence working for you.

gallery.heading:
The stars
of your room
gallery.subheading: Click a card to explore the service.

mostrador.name: Mi Mostrador
mostrador.tagline: Your digital counter, no app or new register needed.
mostrador.description: Your customers scan a QR or enter through your WhatsApp Business link, browse the digital menu and place their full order from their phone. No download needed. Ideal for butchers, bakeries, delis, rotisseries and any neighborhood business that wants to sell more without adding staff at the counter. Smart delivery: configure zones, distances, hours and shipping prices. Also supports counter pickup and advance orders.
features: Digital menu with categories and photos
Orders for pickup or delivery by zone
Integrated payments and automatic confirmation
Works from day one, no new hardware

bots.name: Web bots
bots.tagline: The repetitive stuff? AI handles it.
bots.description: From a bot that tells your club's story or explains your products, to one that recovers lost members or closes sales. It installs on your website, responds with AI trained on your business, captures data in real time and escalates to a human when needed. Everything is logged in a dashboard so your team can take over whenever they want.
features: AI trained on your business content
Real-time data and lead capture
Control panel with conversation history
Human escalation when AI reaches its limits

llamadas.name: Outbound calls
llamadas.tagline: First to call, first to sell.
llamadas.description: Launch mass campaigns of automated calls or SMS: member recovery, birthday greetings, appointment reminders, news updates. And the best part: when the recipient clicks the link in the message, we already know who they are. The conversation starts with their full history, personalized from the very first message.
features: Mass AI calling and SMS campaigns
Recovery of inactive members or customers
Direct sales with AI-assisted consultation and human close
Instant recognition from the sent link
Full history without needing to log in

recepcion.name: Call reception
recepcion.description: When your customer calls, the AI answers instantly. It tells them about your products, services, hours or prices. It schedules appointments, answers frequent questions and when the situation calls for it, routes the call to a human with the full conversation context. No waiting. No missed calls.
features: 24/7 coverage without human intervention
Product, service and hours information
Automatic appointment scheduling
Human handoff with full call history

turnos.name: Appointment management
turnos.tagline: Your team just sees a full calendar.
turnos.description: Your customer books their appointment whenever they want — by chat or by voice — without talking to anyone on your team. The system checks real-time availability from Google Calendar, confirms the appointment and sends a reminder by email. If they need to cancel or reschedule, they do it themselves.
features: Voice or chat booking without human intervention
Real-time sync with Google Calendar
Automatic confirmation and email reminder
Cancellation and rescheduling without calling

sitios.name: Web design
sitios.tagline: Not just a page. Your business selling on its own.
sitios.description: We design your website, online store or landing page with everything included: integrated AI chatbot, appointment system, product catalog and smart forms. It's your salesperson, receptionist and digital advisor working every day. Mobile-first and fast, built so your customer can buy from their phone without friction.
features: Custom websites, ecommerce and landing pages
Integrated AI support bot
Appointment system and product catalog
Hosting, domain and launch included

cta.heading:
Your business running
while you can't.
cta.subheading: No extra staff. No missed sales. AI that works for you.
